  • Method Details

    • testApplyFormulas_nullLedger_returnsZero

      @Test @DisplayName("applyFormulas: Null Ledger should return 0.0") void testApplyFormulas_nullLedger_returnsZero()

    • testApplyFormulas_ledgerWithNullTransactions_returnsZero

      @Test @DisplayName("applyFormulas: Ledger with null transactions list should return 0.0") void testApplyFormulas_ledgerWithNullTransactions_returnsZero()

    • testApplyFormulas_ledgerWithEmptyTransactions_returnsZero

      @Test @DisplayName("applyFormulas: Ledger with empty transactions list should return 0.0") void testApplyFormulas_ledgerWithEmptyTransactions_returnsZero()

    • testApplyFormulas_ledgerWithSingleTransaction_returnsCorrectSum

      @Test @DisplayName("applyFormulas: Ledger with one transaction should return its amount") void testApplyFormulas_ledgerWithSingleTransaction_returnsCorrectSum()

    • testApplyFormulas_ledgerWithMultipleTransactions_returnsCorrectSum

      @Test @DisplayName("applyFormulas: Ledger with multiple transactions should return their sum") void testApplyFormulas_ledgerWithMultipleTransactions_returnsCorrectSum()

    • testApplyFormulas_ledgerWithTransactionReturningNullAmount_ignoresNullAmount

      @Test @DisplayName("applyFormulas: Ledger with transactions having null amounts should ignore nulls") void testApplyFormulas_ledgerWithTransactionReturningNullAmount_ignoresNullAmount()

    • testApplyFormulas_ledgerWithNullTransactionInList_skipsNullTransaction

      @Test @DisplayName("applyFormulas: Ledger with a mix of null and non-null transaction objects should skip nulls") void testApplyFormulas_ledgerWithNullTransactionInList_skipsNullTransaction()

    • testApplyFormulas_allTransactionAmountsNull

      @Test @DisplayName("applyFormulas: Ledger with all transaction amounts being null") void testApplyFormulas_allTransactionAmountsNull()

    • testApplyFormulas_transactionAmountZero

      @Test @DisplayName("applyFormulas: Ledger with a transaction amount of zero") void testApplyFormulas_transactionAmountZero()
